output 2d{15, 25, 25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}

output 3d{15, 25, 25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}

output 4d{15, 25, 25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}
